g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do administrators interact with GameAP?')
sendPrompt('What does GameAP consist of? Tell me about the architecture.')
sendPrompt('How to install GameAP Daemon on Windows?')
sendPrompt('How to install GameAP Daemon on Linux with systemd?')
sendPrompt('How to run GameAP Daemon in Docker?')
sendPrompt('How to set up Counter-Strike 2 via GameAP on Windows?')
sendPrompt('How to set up a Rust server via GameAP on Windows?')
sendPrompt('How to set up a Minecraft server via GameAP on Linux systemd?')
sendPrompt('How to set up a FiveM server via GameAP on Linux systemd?')
sendPrompt('What game server Docker images can GameAP Daemon run?')
